entry.title: Re: DO NOT Install BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP04 or 4.3 SP04 Patch 1
entry.content: We ran a pretty comprehensive regression on 4.3 SP4 PL200.  Granted, we only use BW Bex connections and no FHSQL.  After a lot of regression testing, we thought everything we use was working.  However, after go-live, we discovered that Export from WEBi is completely broken unless the user is a member of the Administrators group.    If you are testing SP4, be sure to test WEBi exports.  I have not tested PL300 yet.

entry.title: Should I wait for SAP SuccessFactors Payroll (aka Next-Gen Cloud Payroll)?
entry.content:
SAP and SAP SuccessFactors clients have several options for world-class payroll from SAP and thereis indeed a new payroll in development: it even has an official name: SAP SuccessFactors Payroll, which you may hear shortened to SFPAY. This is something that has been in the works for several years, and as SAP would say, they continue to innovate in every area including payroll.

To answer the question best, let’s start with the basics. SAP Payroll is the leading global payroll. Period. It has been the consistent standard for organizations since the 1980s, and it is the only one that can handle complex payroll and time, especially globally. There are thousands of clients around the world using on-premise SAP Payroll or SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll to process over 100 million of employees' pay statements each month. The recommended solution for clients is SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll, which is where all of the innovation exists (Such as a use case for their AI Joule in 1H/2024), and will be the gold standard for many years to come.

SAP SuccessFactors Payroll (SFPAY) is an extremely exciting option that will be coming to market in the next few years, however, it is an early adopter innovation available to smaller and simpler clients starting in the UK. The launch target market does not overlap with the type of clients using or that would consider an SAP based payroll system today and will give clients who could not previously consider an SAP based payroll system an awesome option.  US Payroll is also being developed and is currently in beta testing. A few early adopters in the US and UK are participating in the design evolution and early testing to provide feedback to SAP on what a modern cloud-native payroll should do (such as a real-time payroll, interactive pay statements, simpler setup, modern integrations with other systems, and much more).  

So should you wait for it if you use an SAP based payroll system today? That's an easy no. Rome wasn’t built in a day, and neither was SAP Payroll (Or any enterprise payroll system for that matter). The beloved payroll that is in use today has been in use and evolving for over thirty years continues to evolve and get investment from SAP. SAP SuccessFactors is consciously building a new payroll from scratch that runs in the cloud that will allow them to expand their market share, do some very innovative things in payroll, and we are all really excited about it. But it is not going to be readily available anytime soon for existing clients using SAP payroll, and clients should not wait for it to be built before making a change. 

I heard a good quote from colleague and friend Brandon Toombs, that went something like this: “It’s like hearing your favorite team is going to build a new stadium. You are excited about it, but that doesn’t mean you stop cheering on the team until it's built”.   

There is a legitimate urgency for existing SAP HCM clients to transform or move to the cloud because of the dates associated with the end of support for SAP Business Suite 7, as best explained in this blog: SAP Business Suite 7 Extension: What This Means for SAP ERP Human Capital Management clients. SAP SuccessFactors has been supportive of their existing client base in terms of extending the date, and options to ensure clients continue to have the opportunity to get a return on their investment, as detailed in the blog: Bridge options for SAP SuccessFactors clients: Part 2 What is SAP HCM for S/4HANA On-Premise?

It’s been my experience that clients know that they have to ‘do something’, but they are unclear of their options and the urgency associated with each. Our clients come to us for guidance to make and defend their business decisions and deploy them with confidence while operating in a continually evolving climate.

It’s easy to get started. There is no one-size-fits-all transformation path for all SAP SuccessFactors clients, but at EPI-USE Labs we can assist you in determining your best path forward. Based on your requirements and goals, you should start by reviewing the complexity and configuration of your current system, which will impact your decision-making process.  Request your free assessment here.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: My submission for week1.

entry.title: SAP EWM. Displacement from picking to storage area. Idea & step-by-step implementation (with ABAP).
entry.content:
SAP EWM. Displacement from picking to storage area. Idea & Step-by-step implementation.
This blog-post written in collaboration with ABAP-developer Victor Pupynin
 
Intro.
Typical warehouse layout contains next functional areas:
  • Loading and unloading area
  • Goods reception area or warehouse entrance area
  • Repackaging area
  • Warehouse quarantine area
  • Sample selection area
  • Storage area
  • Picking area
  • Order preparation area
  • Warehouse technical area
  • Warehouse administrative area
Problem solved in this blog-post related to Storage area and  Picking and order preparation areas.
So let's do a closer look to activity in it.
 
 
Look at collage photo. This is typical warehouse landscape.
Level 1 -  Picking area
Level 2 and higher  - Storage area
also in the foreground - Order preparation area
 
Typical business scenario:
  1. ERP-operator create in ECC(or S/4HANA) and distribute to EWM Outbound delivery
  2. EWM-operator:   
           2.1. Create wave
           2.2. Assign 1..N outbound deliveries  to created wave
          2.3.  Release wave
          2.4. SAP EWM creates WO/WT according to standard and customer-specific logic 
          2.5. One possible scenario:
if WT quantity > quantity in pallet at storage area: route for pallet is: Storage Area ->  Console -> Order preparation area
  If WT quantity < quantity in pallet at storage area. Route for pallet is: Storage area - > Picking Area - > partial aggregation through source pallet to target pallet - > Order preparation area
 
3.Work in the aisles looks as:
For upper tiers:
High Reach Forklift (Turret Trucks) Something like: Yale MTC10-15L, Hyster C1.0–1.5 or Jungheinrich ETR 230
Remove the pallet from the upper tiers (Storage area) and put it on the lower tier (Picking area) or Console
4.Work at the Console looks as:
Forklift something like Jungheinrich EFG 213
Remove the pallet from Console and put it on the Picking area
  1. Work at the lower tier looks as:
Workers with trolley "Rocla" carry out the picking process in Picking area. They are partial repack stock from source pallet to target pallet and move target pallet to order preparation area
 
Hydraulic "Rocla" trolley  Authors photos.
 
Business problem.
 
Possible problem on Step 2.3.
For a lot of reasons situation when all storage bins at a picking area are full can be occurred.
At this case:
Wave Release status - (E) Error
EWM-operator at warehouse  wind-up face-to-face with not easy to understand wave release log.
 
Resolution
Create automatic displacement from picking to storage area manually and during wave release.
Possible sequence (manually via custom report) :
Step 0. Auxiliary table.
ZLGTYP_ROLE - Lgtyp Role (Storage, Transit, Picking, etc).
LGTYP_PICK - Relation between storage and picking area.
 
 
Step 1. Selection screen
Options:
Range of Outbound deliveries.
Range of Waves.
Range of planed GI dates.
Ideas for Screen implementation - selection_screen_1.abap
main.abap
selection.abap
Step 2. Logic for Scenario when all fields on selection screen on Step 1 were empty.
Select all Outbound deliveries without GI from the period from STVARV variable.
Ideas for selection from STVARV variable -  stvarv.abap
 
Step 3.  Get items Outbound deliveries according to the criteria defined in the Steps 1,2
Idea for Get Outbound deliveries according Range of Waves - get_wave.abap
Ideas how  Get items from Outbound deliveries according Range of Outbound deliveries - get_delivery_item.abap
 
Step 4. Divide items from Outbound deliveries from Step 3 into 2 Lists
List 1.  Item with batch.
List 2.  Items without batch.
Idea for Divide implementation - divide_into_2_lists.abap
 
Step 5. Get available stock for items from Outbound deliveries reсeived on Step 4
Idea for implementation - 
get_stock_for_wt.abap
get_available_stock.abap
 
 
Step 6. Remove bins with open warehouse tasks or under inventory from List received on Step 5
Idea for implementation -
get_stock_for_wt.abap
get_stock_for_wt_class.abap
 
Step 7. Get bins in picking  area for displacement.
Idea for implementation - Displacement/get_displacement_bins.abap
 
Step 8.  Create warehouse tasks for displacement for Stock/bins received on Steps 7 and 8
Idea for implementation -  create_tasks.abap
 
Testing.
Prerequisite: Outbound delivery crated and integrated from S/4HANA to EWM.
Transaction /SCWM/WAVE
Assign Outbound Delivery (Warehouse Requests)
Available Stock. HU located at the storage area.
 
Storage Bin at Aisle 01
No Empty (or not blocked) storage bins.  Displacement inevitably.
Deplanement in action.
 
Conclusion.
Approach for displacement from picking to storage area was provided.

entry.title: Re: Adding task description to all recordings
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm not aware of any way to modify the information on existing Simulations but it is possible to do this for new Simulations by modifying the Recording Dictionary.  The macro text created during the recording of any Simulation is determined from the entries in the Recording Dictionary.

If you click on the Recording Dictionaries folder and then click the yellow + in the top center part of the screen, you will be able to create your own recording dictionary.  Once you create a recording dictionary, double click it to open it and then modify the text strings, for the relevant languages, to include your standard text.  After saving the changes, right click your new dictionary and select Set as Default to use that dictionary while recording new Simulations.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Incentive Management OData APIs (Kubernetes) Questions
entry.content:
So I found out from one of the people who actually work on that API, that there seems to be an issue with the JSON.parse function for big numbers.  (Who knew?)

She suggested a code change and it works.  So instead of having this:

const data = await apiResponse.json();
const res= JSON.parse(data);

She told me to use this:

const data = await apiResponse.text();
const jsonWithQuotes = data.replace(/PipelineRunSeq\":\s*[^"0-9.]*([0-9.]+)/g, 'PipelineRunSeq\":"$1"');
const res = JSON.parse(jsonWithQuotes);
 
I'm going to do some research on JSON.parse() to see if there is any option to parse big numbers as text.  In any case, I'm good to go.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Order: Undo Deletion of Deleted Operations
entry.content:
Just wanted to confirm, we are in latest version of S4 Hana, but to get "undo delete" option we need to:

  1. Implement the note 3083769 
  2. Ensure the WO is released
  3. Select display deletions
  4. And then the option of "undo deletion" will appear?

Hi Hugo

Did you manage to settle on a solution for these requirements? Please could you post high level what the solution was that you went with?  

I have the same question, client not using ECC or S4/HANA. 

Many thanks!

Shalene

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
Hi @VanessaLi,

No, the SF Teams app is not working. It was working initially without user mapping working (when I first raised the ticket in 2023) but then it stopped and hasn't been working since. 

So are you saying the user who is performing the user mapping in SF also needs to be AD Azure admin who established the connection in AD Azure? Essentially you need to be SF admin and AD Azure admin at the same time?

That is not possible in most sizable organisation I would thought..... These applications are completely separate and will not be managed by the same team / area. I am the SF admin in our company and AD Azure is a different team altogether.

And just to be clear, I have a profile in AD Azure and my username in SF matches my OnPremisesSamAccountName in AD Azure, I am just not an admin in AD Azure.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: The 2024 Developer Insights Survey: The Report
entry.content:
Great survey info, thanks.

As for the "BTP Developers Guide" - it's a CAP tutorial in GitHub. Seriously, it's like false advertising.

Put it in the SAP Help and expand it to all the other developer tech on BTP and then you can call it a "BTP Developers Guide". Until then, maybe not?

Regards, Martin.

entry.title: Re: Post Incoming payments with an API S/4HANA CLOUD Publ...
entry.content:
Hello David, 

I have exactly the same situation (need to post DZ payment clearing an Billing/RV document). 

It was possible to do it with the POST and Clearing SOAP interfaces as yout mentioned in your last comment? 

Regards. 

Matheus

entry.title: Is there a way to see who is logged into a particular scanner
entry.content: Is there any way to be able to see who was last to login to a hand held scanner? People are starting to hide scanners and it would be nice to be able to track them and be able to ask the person.

entry.title: Re: Use deployed CF App with two different backend systems
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

      We have same situation in our project. Appreciate if you please let us know how you met this requirement. 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Data Import Error "Contact with ID &1 does not have ID &2"
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have been having this kind of error recently: "Contact with ID &1 does not have ID &2" in the Import Monitor and Data Load Monitor. The message number is the 318 and message class is CUAN_IC, object type CUAN_IMPORT and Service Name API_MKT_CONTACT_SRV.

The number of failed imported records is always 4 consisting of email, permissions and Marketing area.

The Error messages also contain something like this:

  • Contact with ID DATAMART-DM0000000XYZ does not have ID EMAIL - name__lastname@email.com
  • Contact with ID DATAMART-DM0000000MPQ does not have ID EMAIL- nameNNN_@email2.com
  • Contact with ID DATAMART-DM0000000ABC does not have ID EMAIL- name_lastname_@email3.com

Our Database (Datamart) already compiles authenticated and verified emails, the emails (ID &2) exist there for the contacts that present the error as well as the ID&1. In CPI we don't have any error associated with this. So something is preventing the storage in SAP Marketing Cloud.

The emails that are affected as you may see above in the examples have different formats like doble underscore or an underscore before the @domain.com.

Do you think something in SAP Marketing Cloud is preventing the storage of the email like the format?

If so, can we modify that?

Do you think something else must be related?

Thakn you so much for your answers

Regards 

Rebeca

entry.title: Re: SAP BO 4.1 upgrade to 4.3
entry.content:
Hi,

Did you end up getting an opportunity to do the upgrade from 4.1 to 4.3 , what were the challenges that you came across ?

Kind regards,

Sai

entry.title: How to track the change history of process order ?
entry.content:
I know that we can see when the changes are made with the status. 

But I want to know when, who and how much the stock amount was changed in the process order. 

If the question is unclear plz comment. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: 入門！SAP Analytics Cloud for planning 機能紹介シリーズ - コメント入力
entry.content:
本ブログシリーズはSAP Analytics CloudのPlanning機能をこれから学ぶ方を対象とし、予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要なSAP Analytics Cloudのそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介します。 

※機能の詳細ついてはSAP Help Portalを参照ください。 

※ SAP Analytics Cloudは、四半期に１度のペースで製品のバージョンアップが実施されます。そのため今後のバージョンアップにより、本ブログで紹介する画面キャプチャや、操作が異なる可能性があることをご了承ください。（本ブログは2024年5月に作成しています。）

本ブログでは、SAP Analytics Cloudにおけるコメント入力をご紹介します。

目次：

  • SAP Analytics Cloudにおけるデータコメント
  • ストーリーコメント
  • データポイントコメント
  • ディメンションコメント
  • 終わり

SAP Analytics Cloudにおけるデータコメント

SAP Analytics Cloudのデータコメントでは、３つのコメントタイプが提供されています：

  • ストーリーコメント：ユーザーがストーリー内の特定のページやウィジェットにコメントを追加できる機能です。特定のページやウィジェットで直接的にインサイトをディスカッションし、質問と回答のやり取りをするためのインタラクティブな手段を提供します。
  • データポイントコメント：テーブル内の特定のデータポイントに注目し、ユーザーが個々のセル値にコメントを追加できる機能です。 特定のデータポイントに対するコンテキストや説明を提供し、データのコンテキストに沿った、インサイトに関するディスカッションを行います。
  • ディメンションコメント：特定のディメンションにコメントをつけることを可能にし、データポイントコメントと比較して、より広範なコンテキストを提供します。

必要となるライセンス

コメント入力機能はプランニングライセンス(SAP Analytics Cloud for planning, predictive edition)は不要で、 基本のBIライセンス (SAP Analytics Cloud for business intelligence, predictive edition) で利用できる機能です。詳しくはSAP Help Portal：分析モデル用の機能 (ライセンスタイプ別)をご参照ください。

ストーリーコメント

SAP Analytics Cloudでは、ストーリーの特定のページやウィジェットにコメントを追加することが可能です。これにより、他のユーザーがあなたのコメントに返信したり、「いいね！」をすることができます。

利用方法

ストーリーページタブでのコメント作成

ストーリーページにコメントを追加するには、ページタブバーでドロップダウンメニューを選択し、「コメント」→表示されたボックスにコメントを入力します。

ウィジェットでのコメントの作成

ウィジェットに新しいコメントを追加するには、ウィジェットを選択し、「その他のオプション」→「追加」→「コメント」をクリックします。表示されたボックスにテキストを入力できます。

コメントの共有

ストーリーがチームの特定のメンバーが共有された場合、@マークで他のメンバーをメンションすることが可能です。

ビューモードでのコメントの確認

ユーザーがストーリーのチャートやその他のウィジェットを変更する権限がなくても、他の要素に対するコメントを追加してチームと重要な情報を共有することができます。コメントを作成すると、システムはそれにスレッド番号を割り当て、ビューモードでコラボレーションエリアの右側に表示します。

コメントの編集及び履歴の確認

コメントポップアップでは、以前のコメントに返信することができ、新しいコメントはスレッドに追加されます。また、コメントに「いいね」をつけたり、コメントを入力した場合は削除することができます。

注記と制限

  • SAP Analytics Cloudは、特定のページタブやウィジェットに最大200のコメントを保存でき、自動的にスレッドに分類し、日付順に番号を付けます。
  • 入力コントロールがあるウィジェットにはコメントを追加できません。
  • ストーリーコメントは最大 10,000 文字まで入力できます。

データポイントコメント

データポイントコメントは、特定のデータポイントにコメントを追加する機能です。ディメンションの組み合わせで定義されたメジャーの数値とセットで管理され、コメントポップアップ内で編集を行い、履歴として管理されます。テーブル上には最新のコメントのみが表示され、コメントウィジェットで表示することも可能です。対応するメジャーに数値が入力されていない場合は、データポイントコメントを入力することはできません。
また、そのコメントはデータポイントのアクセス権に基づいて管理されます。例えば、特定の地域に関するデータのみを表示できるユーザーがコメントを追加した場合、そのコメントは同じ地域のデータを表示する権限を持つ他のユーザーにのみ表示されます。アクセス権がないユーザーは、コメントを見ることができません。
データポイントのコメントはモデルに関連付けられており、同じモデルを使用して作成された新しいストーリーやアプリケーションで、すべてのコメントを見ることができます。

利用方法

コメント機能の有効化

データポイントコメントを作成するには、事前に該当のウィジェットのビルダパネルで「データポイントコメントを許可」にチェックを入れる必要があります。

データポイントコメントの作成

次に、セルを選択し、「データポイントコメントを追加」をクリックします。表示されたボックスにテキストを入力できます。

注記と制限

  • モデルごとに最大3000件（設定可能）のデータポイントコメントスレッドと、各スレッドに100件の返信を残せます。
  • ユーザーは各コメントに最大10,000文字を入力できます。
  • コピーによるバージョン作成では、新しいコピーされたバージョンにコメントは含まれません。

ディメンションコメント

ディメンションコメントは、データの特定の部分に対するテキストベースの説明を提供する機能です。これは、行ディメンションやフィルタに基づいて管理され、テーブル上のセルとして表示されます。ユーザーは、直接セルで編集やペーストが可能です。これにより、データの特定の部分に対する追加情報や説明を提供することができます。

利用方法

ディメンションコメントの作成

列軸で指定されたディメンションのメンバーセルを選択し、右クリックして「クライアント計算の追加」→「ディメンションコメント」を選択します。

ディメンションコメントの表示

ディメンションコメント列は、行とメジャーの間に最初の列として表示されます。

注記と制限

  • ディメンションコメントは、最適化プレゼンテーションオプションが有効化されたテーブルでのみサポートされます。
  • 混合モデルやライブデータモデルからはディメンションコメントを追加できません。
  • ロールベースのデータセキュリティやデータアクセス制御は、ディメンションコメントには適用されません。
  • ディメンションコメントの最大文字数は255文字です。

終わり

今回はコメント入力機能のご紹介でした。SAP Analytics Cloudは予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要な機能を備えており、本ブログシリーズではそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介しています。こちらのリンクからご参照ください。

entry.title: Re: What's New for SAP Build Apps - Enhanced Fusion Development
entry.content: Hi @EsmeeX @Venkat_Vyza - Is there any updates to the above query please? I'm having the same issue

entry.title: Re: Mitigation issue in Access Risk analysis
entry.content:
Hello, Abhiram! 

Check if when you run "Risk Analysis: User Level", the "include Mitigated Risks" option is unchecked. So, it will appear just unmitigated risks (existing risks to the user).

Also, check if the risk is really mitigated to the user in "Mitigated users" tile.

Your details are too broad.

entry.title: 缺料
entry.content: 缺料

entry.title: Re: How to delete rows in system matrix
entry.content:
oMatrix.Columns.Item("0").Cells.Item(i).Click(SAPbouiCOM.BoCellClickType.ct_Right);

oApplication.ActivateMenuItem("1293");

Above code can work, it there is small bug, the right click menu appears and need to close manually.

entry.title: Re: Access Request Completion on Wrong System
entry.content:
Hello!

I think it can be BRFplus or the way that the roles were imported to GRC. You must select the correct client when you import your roles.

But, you said that is provisioning in production environment, so I supposed that there is a connection to you production system. Also, check you RFC, maybe it is using a Development system to the connector name, but the connection may be with Production system.

entry.title: Re: Provisioining Profiles through GRC 12
entry.content:
Hello, Quadir!

If there are no roles in backend system, you have to created these roles and import to GRC, or configure BRM modelo in GRC to create your roles.

entry.title: Re: Access Request role search restriction using GRAC_ROL...
entry.content:
Hello, Nandita!

Have you tried to restrict by Role Status? You can select the roles and change their status from Production to Development status.

Before you must be configure those status on SPRO in GRC system.

Path: Go to SPRO > SAP Reference IMG > Governance, Risk and Compliance > Access Control > Role Management > Maintain Role Status.

entry.title: Adding SAP Cloud ALM to "Instances & Subscriptions" in SAP BTP Cockpit
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I am trying to add SAP Cloud ALM to my instances under "Subscriptions and Instances", but this is not working.

I can only find something about SAP Cloud ALM under "Destinations". When I wanted to list it as an instance under "Subscriptions and Instances", it did not work via the Create function because it could not be found in the list.

I then went to the "Entitlements" tab and tried "Edit --> And Service Plans", but it couldn't be found in the list either.

What can I do to solve the problem? I am using the trial version of SAP Cloud ALM and need it for my bachelor thesis to be able to use SAP Signavio Process Insights.

Many thanks in advance,
Berkay

entry.title: Re: Mass Upload for Access Control Owners
entry.content:
Hello, Hasan!

If you wanto to change Role Owners, you should go to Role Mass Update tile.

There is 4 steps there.

On 2 step, you must fill in the fields as below:

On 3 step, you should fill in the old and new information. Make sure that the New Role Owner was defined on Access Control Owners as a Role Owner.

entry.title: Re: Risk is not appearing in Risk analysis Screen
entry.content:
Hello, Abhiram!

Make sure you have imported SOD Rules in GRAC_UPLOAD_RULES transaction. And Generated SOD Rules in GRAC_GENERATE_RULES transaction

entry.title: Re: Ticket for SAP Cryptographic Library for SSL
entry.content:
Hi,

 

2415735 - License Ticket File for SSL Connection Is No Longer Required

"As the ticket is no longer used, the option to upload a ticket file is removed from the user interface and the mentioned error message will not appear.
If you do not use a supported service pack, you can create a dummy file in /usr/sap/<SID>/<INST>/sec with name “ticket”."

entry.title: Re: WorkZone Administration Console Access denied
entry.content: Excellent find. I was running into the same issue and "hard-coded" usernames into the target mapping. Your solution solved this issue... (It is 2024 now and SAP still did not update their documentation... oh well...)

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now Information Sessions (APJ Friendly Times)
entry.content: Hi @ShaneLipke , do you have a link to the recording on the session you did for "Creating and Editing Enable Now Simulations using Manager" please?

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 - Installation of Demo database
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm presently in the process of installing version 10.0, the latest edition available, along with its demo database.

Thanks.

entry.title: Inviting the "Grandfathers" of SAP to participate and share
entry.content:
When I joined the SAP World in 2003 there was nothing like a "Community", at least not online.

I learned the Netweaver 2004 the "hard way" which was - now looking backwards - a good starting point. Since these days the Marketplace, SDN or whatever was the name at that time, was was moved and renamed several times, my experience and knowledge remained and was growing. 

Looking at this group now I see some 13xx members. Walking through the offices worldwide in all these companies I have been, I remember many more. Thousands for me, millions in the worldwide consultants-scene. All these consultants working every day with these products, inventing, loving and sometimes even complaining about and then improving implementations, there is so much 

  • knowledge
  • experience
  • last but not least "wound fingers, tired eyes and hopes" that IT* "worx"... 

It would be really helpful to share all this knowledge from the experienced consultants about their module and profession. The "do's and don'ts", anecdotes, helpful links and docs. 

I would highly appreciate to wake up more of these day to day workers not only doing their next job, waiting to retire some day, extending the contract...

... but rather and also share, participate, give and let know. Just a few pages every year only. Tiny little things which to find I needed sometimes sooo long 😞

Thx

 

 

* IT may be seen as Information Technology or the tiny litle adapter module exit you just created.

entry.title: How to set the growing attribute of smart table in the RAP maintian view?
entry.content:
I want to set the growing attribute of smarttable in the RAP maintain view. It worked fine on the BAS, but cannot get the table object on the fiori launchpad when the page is first loaded.

Does anyone know how to set the grow attribute of RAP maintain view?

 

onInit: function () {
                var oResposiveTable = this.getView().byId("fe::table::_ProcessItemAutoRule::LineItem-innerTable");
                if(oResposiveTable){ //As object page also load this event, so need add this check
                    oResposiveTable.setGrowing(true);
                    oResposiveTable.setGrowingScrollToLoad(true);
                    oResposiveTable.setGrowingThreshold(100);
                }
            }

entry.title: FV60 Enhancement Points
entry.content:
Dear All

I need an Enhancement or BADI to calculate amount and cost centre value based on Personal Number entered in line item.

I have tried BADIs BADI_FDCB_SUBBAS01 and BADI_FDCB_SUBBAS04 but multiple implementations are not allowed hence second implementation is not activating.

BTE Event 00001140 can be used but only for validations.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation -Automatic Creation of S...
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

Any comments on the below query ?

entry.title: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request failed with status code 401
entry.content:
When I create the SAPUI5 Adaptation project, I got the error: Request failed with status code 401

I checked my SAP system setting, it's working fine for connection of SAP backend system.

I turned on Trace mode for extension Application Wizard in VS Code to track the log when I process the same above-mentioned steps.

In the output screen, it showed error

My error message is like below:

2024-05-08T08:18:44.267Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : Response status = 401

2024-05-08T08:18:44.267Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : END - system response error result.

2024-05-08T08:18:44.269Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : AxiosError: Request failed with status code 401

 

Compared to the log from my colleague with no such issue, he got bellow log message. For the 404 error, it should not be a problem, because he didn't select the version. In his case, the system connection is fine from his side by using SAPUI5 Adaptation project.

2024-05-08T08:49:49.499Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : Basic information: {"projectName":"app.variant1","applicationTitle":"App Variant Title","namespace":"customer.app.variant1"}

2024-05-08T08:49:51.872Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : Base URL = [SAP URL]
2024-05-08T08:49:51.872Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : client = 100
2024-05-08T08:49:53.150Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : OnPremise dta_folder = true
2024-05-08T08:49:53.150Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : UI Flex = true
2024-05-08T08:49:53.653Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : Base URL = [SAP URL]
2024-05-08T08:49:53.653Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : client = 100
2024-05-08T08:50:12.120Z [ADP Creation] [INFO] : [ADP Creation] Error on validating ui5 version: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 404

I also checked with authorization colleague, and my SAP account got no authorization issue for system connection. It might be something wrong for my local setting. Does anyone can help me with this issue?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: App UI5 in workzone show loading screen never end
entry.content:
After we exposed role from backend system via tcode /UI2/CDM3_EXP_SCOPE to BTP trial, we can open app type GUI in site of SAP build workzone. But cannot open app UI5 or WDA

app UI5 show loading screen never end until it timeout and logout.

WDA encountered error 500 internal server

anw, all apps type can open normally when open directly from Fiori Launchpad if execute tcode /ui2/flp from backend system

We was tried to activated all odata and icf related in catalog of role, and updated latest UI5 patch version but still encounter error.

Do we need to do any step after exposed role ?

We was follow instruction here to integration backend system with sap build workzone: https://developers.sap.com/mission.launchpad-s4hana.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Commissions on Hyperscaler - 🛠️Setup your own sFTP Key as Self Service
entry.content: @Ashwani_Koul- you or Admin should gather the keys together for multiple users and append in same key in next line .. uploaded it back to XDL SFTP configuration.  If you have API access to XDL, you can check which key is uploaded.

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
@Ethan_Dai  The work tech admin does not have to be the Azure admin. However the work tech admin himself/herself might not have valid mapping, this does not impact other end users with valid mapping. Sometimes the mapping may fail for the work tech admin but indeed the app is working for other end users.

I see that you have chosen User.username and onPremiseSAMAccountName, could you please provide two screenshots 1. The username of your logged in user, 2. The field from Azure and its value, I want to make sure we are looking at the right field. If you have concerns about posting it here, please send it to me via direct email vanessa.li@sap.com with any sensitive information blurred out, if needed let's troubleshoot this on a call.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now Information Sessions (APJ Friendly Times)
entry.content:
The link to the recording of the Creating and Editing Enable Now Simulations using Manager is here.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: how to retrieve processing status code from mass data programmatically in ABSL?
Does SAP Service&Support limit quota for raise service request or cases or expert chat & charge fee
entry.content:
i see information in this question:https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/does-sap-charge-for-incidents/qaq-p/12151650

but my organization said it will depend on the contact which why we have S-User to use, and if we raise too much cases to Service&Report, they will be charge fee back to the organization in end of each year ?

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
Thanks @VanessaLi for looking into this for me.

I have sent the screenshots to your email address.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hi @carlos_riva ,

Depending on how you integrated CDC in your solution, you can remove the duplicate profiles using the CDC API, SDK, Dataflow or Extension, etc. And how you define "duplicate" is also important, are these profiles having the same email id or user name or custom id? You can manually remove the dups or setup a dataflow to regularly and automatically remove the dups or even prevent the dups to be created in CDC in the first place. 

And if you're just starting to use CDC, you may register our live session or watch the recording at https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/sap-customer-data-cloud-essentials-1

entry.title: Pick Labels getting mixed during Printing
entry.content:
Hello Expert,
Has anyone of you have experienced this issue and got any solution on that?
 
During Picking Process, operator press - Print HU Labels, it gets printed, and operator collects them. But multiple operators are pressing Print HU from their devices, and this is causing mixing of HU Labels.
Requirement is all HU Labels for each operator / warehouse order should get printed sequentially and then it should print for operator / wo.
 
Regards,
Avdhoot

entry.title: Re: Duplicate clients in CDC
entry.content:
Hi @carlos_riva 

You can use the Identity Query or Dataflow tool to pull the duplicate profiles based on the profile attributes. But the query will be written based on how you define the dups. 

Hope it help:)

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Cloud - BAS issue when fiori app is deployed a second time (redeployed)
entry.content: May I know how you solved it?

entry.title: Re: sap mdk object table getSelectedItems binding is comi...
entry.content:
Thank you so much @bill_froelich.

 

Look like, the bind option is only possible if I include key in my object binding. If I want to display only the description and get the object binding, is there any way I can get that ?

entry.title: sap mdk action bar style navigating from object list view
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to set color for the action bar item , it is working fine in all other places but not in detail view, navigated from list to detail. 

How to change the color of the left side action bar item? the text is coming by default. Even If i set Style to Add New button it is not working. 

Page metadata,

{
	"Controls": [
		{
			"FilterFeedbackBar": {
				"ShowAllFilters": false,
				"_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
			},
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
			"_Name": "SectionedTable0",
			"Sections": [
				{
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": true,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectTable",
					"Target": {
						"Service": "/MDK_EQL_STCE/Services/StceApi.service",
						"EntitySet": "PayCodes",
						"QueryOptions": "$filter=payCodeType eq 'H' and favourite eq true"
					},
					"_Name": "SectionObjectTable0",
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false
					},
					"ObjectCell": {
						"ContextMenu": {
							"Items": [],
							"PerformFirstActionWithFullSwipe": true,
							"LeadingItems": [],
							"TrailingItems": []
						},
						"Title": "{payCodeDesc}",
						"AccessoryType": "None",
						"AccessoryButtonIcon": "sap-icon://delete",
						"Tags": [],
						"AvatarStack": {
							"ImageIsCircular": true,
							"ImageHasBorder": false
						},
						"AvatarGrid": {
							"ImageIsCircular": true
						},
						"Selected": false
					},
					"HighlightSelectedItem": false
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"_Type": "Page",
	"_Name": "FavouritePayCode",
	"Caption": "Favourite Paycodes",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true,
	"ActionBar": {
		"Items": [
			{
				"_Name": "ActionBarItem0",
				"Caption": "Add New",
				"Position": "Right",
				"IsIconCircular": false,
				"Visible": true,
				"OnPress": "/MDK_EQL_STCE/Actions/Favourites/NavToPayCodeFavAddNewDialog.action"
			}
		],
		"_Name": "ActionBar1"
	}
}
 

Action of object cell on press item,

{
	"_Type": "Action.Type.Navigation",
	"ActionResult": {
		"_Name": "NavToFavPaycode"
	},
	"PageToOpen": "/MDK/Pages/Favourites/FavouritePayCode.page"
}

Thanks in advance.

@bill_froelich @Jitendra_Kansal

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 10.0 - Installation of Demo database
entry.content:
In SAP 10 versions, the creation of SBODemo during installation no longer exists. After installation, it's necessary to download and possibly convert the SBODemo database. To do this, access the link below and open the PDF; within the PDF, there is the SBODemo base for SQL and HANA.

SBO Demo

Rgs

Fabio

entry.title: Re: Smooth transition for XML-based Workflows to Workflow Derivation through Business Rules
entry.content:
Hi  @antoniovp ,

Need your help. 

If we have the below xml code in the rule,how we should keep the rule in frontend?
<equal id="jobInfo.location" value="CEAT_LOC_PL_MUM" compareToNew="false"/>

Please let me know if I'm correct here- I kept jobinfomodel.loc.previous value with "is equal to".
or do i need to keep "is not equal to"?

entry.title: Re: Query con fecha de compra de las unidades que hay dis...
entry.content:
Hola.

Quizás te sea útil utilizar la tabla OINM que contiene todos los movimientos de inventario del artículo de cualquier documento en SAP, pero en este caso específico, te recomendaría activar el control por lotes, de esta manera cada compra generaría un lote y tendrías el control del consumo de esa cantidad/lote.

Atentamente.

Fabio.

entry.title: Re: Restrict Sales Orders Fiori app Links/Actions
entry.content: These links are controlled by the same semantic object + action combo that user is authorised to. For example: #salesorder-display,  #salesorder-change. The pre-requisite is the same semantic object for the app you're currently in.

entry.title: SAP SD Create Condition Record Automatically Based on 2 Semifinished Goods Price
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 
 my client have requirement that there is one BOM who is having 2 SFG Component and both component sales price is maintained in VK11, 
The Requirement is Based on SFG Price FG Price Condition automatically Create.

Example: 1 SFG= 100 Rs + 2SFG=100 Rs  then FG=200

How to Achieve this, Please suggest me the Function Module , BAPI and the steps how to conclude this,
 #ConditionRecord
@Lakshmipathi 
@

entry.title: Re: B1 Formatted Search Query: Volume & Weight Calculation
entry.content:
I hate to be the bearer of bad news but you can't do what you're asking with stock SAP using an FMS.

If the data is not in the database then you can't pull it with FMS from a grid.  There is no way I know of that can loop the columns to do the total.  There is the "Volume and Weight Calculation" menu which shows it but you have to click into it (icons along the top).

Once the document is added, then the weight is totaled and stored at the header level and you can use something like SELECT $[OPDN.Weight] (SQL) and SELECT $[OPDN.Weight] FROM DUMMY (HANA) in FMS format to pull the info.

The issue with FMS queries is you can't loop the rows to do any totals UNLESS you have either an SDK add-on or something like B1UP.  You could easily loop through the rows and do a total of a column with B1UP using a WHILE loop or some UI API code.

Without it you will be stuck with the "Volume and Weight Calculation" menu.

If you do have B1UP I can help you with a macro to pull the information you need, B1UP can also place the fields better than the SAP UI editing.  Check out my demo:

http://b1updemo.battleshipcobra.com

Mike

entry.title: Re: B1 Formatted Search Query: Volume & Weight Calculation
entry.content:
It seems you're discussing how to utilize SAP's standard features. You're suggesting using the system's capabilities where if an item is measured in "pieces," you can input the weight of one piece, or if it's in kilograms, input 1 kg as the weight, and the system will automatically calculate the net weight.

Example

When you input the data into the item master data, it automatically calculates the net weight on the line.

And it already sums up the total quantity and net weight in the summary.

Rgs

Fabio

entry.title: Re: Update UDF for Delivery Note
entry.content:
Hello!

Couple of quick questions which will help determine the exact code and approach.

Are you using HANA or SQL?  HANA is a bit easier to do aggregate string concatenation STRING_AGG() although it's definitely something I have done in SQL too.

Secondly, you mention "I have fields for Tracking Number and Shipping Charges".  I'm assuming these are UDFs?  The system tracking number might be OK to UPDATE directly but I would never update any system shipping charge field through raw UPDATE queries.

If you are using all UDFs on the end documents then it's really pretty easy, you would be able to use the PTN (PostTransactionNotification), just detect object 15 and update the fields directly.

If you wanted to extend this and actually write to system fields or directly write into the document header (or row) freight to automate the process you would need to use the DI API.  You would want something like B1UP to do this.

BUT, if you just want to take your UDT info and output it to UDFs on the delivery then it's simple, just let me know if it's HANA or SQL and I'll throw out some steps and examples,

M
